title: senecio iscoensis
intro: Senecio iscoensis, also known as Isco Mountain ragwort, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, but further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness. In herbal preparations, the leaves of Senecio iscoensis are typically dried and used as a tea or added to other remedies, although caution should be taken due to potential toxicity.
